task_completion.description: The gasket footprint matches the bottom of the bracket
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a new sketch or 3D shape in FreeCAD whose outer boundary exactly matches the bottom face/footprint of the T8 housing bracket.

task_completion.description: Four mounting holes are included in the gasket
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for exactly 4 holes in the newly created gasket (either in the sketch or the 3D solid) that align perfectly with the 4 corner mounting holes of the original bracket.

task_completion.description: The gasket is extruded to a 2mm thickness
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Pad' or 'Extrude' operation in the FreeCAD tree view. The property editor should ideally show a length/thickness of 2.0mm, or the 3D view should show a visibly thin solid (approx 2mm) mating to the bracket.

task_completion.description: Both the original bracket and the new gasket are in the workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the FreeCAD Tree View (Combo View); it should list both the original 'T8_housing_bracket' body/features and the newly created gasket body/features in the same document.

task_completion.description: The file is saved to the correct path with the correct name
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the FreeCAD window title bar for 'T8_gasket' or a 'Save As' dialog/terminal window confirming the file is saved to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/T8_gasket.FCStd.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD GUI to model the gasket
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing active use of FreeCAD workbenches (like Part Design or Sketcher), toolbars, and the tree view, rather than just executing a background script.

integrity.description: The gasket was genuinely modeled rather than imported
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD tree view should show a history of modeling operations (e.g., Sketch, Pad, ShapeBinder, or Boolean operations) used to create the gasket.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the task using terminal file copying
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent didn't just use 'cp' or 'mv' in the terminal to rename an existing file to 'T8_gasket.FCStd' without doing the actual CAD work.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The reference part is 'T8_housing_bracket'. The expected gasket must have exactly 4 mounting holes matching the corner holes of the bracket. The target thickness is 2.0mm. The final file must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/T8_gasket.FCStd' and contain BOTH the original bracket and the new gasket.
